name: Chicken Véronique
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter and oil in a large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and sauté, turning once, until the meat turns white, about 8 minutes. Remove the chicken from the pan and keep it warm. Add the wine to the pan and bring it to a boil, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon.
2. Stir in the cream and continue boiling, stirring occasionally, until the sauce thickens slightly, about 5 minutes. Add the chicken and grapes, then heat through.
